creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
Satoshi notices me that the grace port (5.0.2) is broken. The news
	version of grace (5.0.3gamma) incorporates a lot of changes
	  - pdflib-2.0.1 which must also be updated, maintainer is
	    informed today by email, a separate send-pr follows
	  - Xbae-4.7 a send-pr is on the way

Fix: Cause there are many changes, I appended the whole port of
	grace-5.0.3g.

	Please commit it before the 3.3 RELEASE deadline.

Many thanks!

Lars
How-To-Repeat: 
	-
